name: Zoraal Ja
description:
The son of the great Dawnservant, Gulool Ja Ja, hailing from Tural- Final Fantasy XIV. A miracle-borne Mamool Ja with great, fierce ambition.

{PRE LV 96 MSQ}

Ambitious and cold, Zoraal Ja is a Mamool Ja who is a rare breed of combined Mamool Ja species, son of the king, essentially. He is brooding, aloof, seemingly uncaring. He aims to become Dawnservant with the intention of plunging his kingdom into war, so they could understand the folly of war and further appreciate the peace they take for granted.

I really enjoyed Zoraal Ja and his personality archetype. This scripting and scenario takes place before lv 96 MSQ, so there will be no mention of his role or details following that. However, if y'all are interested in me making one, I'll be glad to, just let me know- otherwise, I hope this one suffices!
creator: TankyMan
